decisions.rationale: CRISIS-01 is correctly scoped as canonical reusable at frontend/src/components/crisis/CrisisSupportCard.vue; layout_notes directs DASH-07 to import rather than duplicate. DASH-07 duplicate target_files and full interior AC are a MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD amendment (add depends_on CRISIS-01, mount-only AC-1) — not a CRISIS-01 rewrite; fix at DASH implement wave.

CRISIS-01 target_files already includes index.ts and layout_notes documents @/components/crisis export for bTIfU/bTIwu/bTIfa/bTIfw consumers. Explicit barrel-export AC is documentation polish — add at implement or when SETTINGS decomposes; does not block CRISIS advance.

PATHS-02 layout_notes explicitly defers bTIwu mount to MOD-DRSAM-CRISIS; CRISIS-01 names bTIwu host per scope_boundaries. Missing PATHS depends_on CRISIS-01 is a MOD-DRSAM-PATHS gap — extend PATHS-07 or add PATHS-08 at PATHS decompose/implement, not CRISIS rewrite.

ui_refs includes Text_caption_ style entity referenced in AC-2; criteria_audit ui_refs passed. style_ref:bTIdn anchor is redundant traceability — Text_caption_ resolution is sufficient for implement fidelity.

summary: Review ok (91% readiness, 0 blockers); CRISIS-01 artifact sound. 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance decompose: amend DASH-07 at DASH implement (depends_on CRISIS-01, mount-only), add PATHS consumer item for bTIwu, optional index.ts AC at implement.
